lines.english: Day and night, I chant Your Name. ||1||
I am worthless; I have no virtue at all.
God is the Creator, the Cause of all causes. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੀ ਆਸ ਮਨਿ ਧਾਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam tere kee aas man dhaaree |2|
lines.english: Your Name is my mind's only hope. ||2||
I am foolish, stupid, ignorant and thoughtless;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਰਮ ਨ ਸਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam karam na saadhaa |
lines.english: I have not practiced chanting, deep meditation, self-discipline or good actions;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਨਾ ਮਤਿ ਮੇਰੀ ਥੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kichhoo na jaanaa mat meree thoree |
lines.english: I know nothing, and my intellect is inadequate.
Prays Nanak, O God, You are my only Support. ||4||18||69||
but within my mind, I have worshipped God's Name. ||3||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਖਰ ਦੁਇ ਇਹ ਮਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har akhar due ih maalaa |
lines.english: These two words, Har, Har, make up my maalaa.
Continually chanting and reciting this rosary, God has become merciful to me, His humble servant. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਦੇਹੁ ਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa raakhahu saranaaee mo kau dehu hare har japanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Shower Your Mercy upon me, and keep me safe in Your Sanctuary; please, give me the maalaa, the rosary of Har, Har. ||1||Pause||
I offer my prayer to the True Guru.
One who enshrines this rosary of the Lord's Name within his heart,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਮਾਲੈ ਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੋਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai samaalai mukh har har bolai |
lines.english: The humble being who contemplates the Lord within his heart, and chants the Lord's Name, Har, Har, with his mouth,
is freed of the pains of birth and death. ||2||

lines.translit: har maalaa taa kai sang jaae |4|19|70|
lines.english: goes to the next world with the maalaa of the Lord's Name. ||4||19||70||
Says Nanak, one who is imbued with the Name,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਇਤ ਉਤ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਡੋਲੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so jan it ut kateh na ddolai |3|
lines.english: never wavers, here or hereafter. ||3||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਲੇਪੁ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis jan lep na biaapai koe |1|
lines.english: No stain clings to such a humble being. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa sabh kichh tis kaa hoe |
lines.english: All things belong to Him - let yourself belong to Him as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਮੁਕਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa sevak sad hee mukataa |
lines.english: The Lord's servant is liberated forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੋਈ ਭਲ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਅਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਦਾਸ ਕੀ ਜੁਗਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karai soee bhal jan kai at niramal daas kee jugataa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever He does, is pleasing to His servant; the way of life of His slave is immaculately pure. ||1||Pause||
- how can Maya cling to him? ||2||
One who renounces everything, and enters the Lord's Sanctuary
Says Nanak, I have found the Perfect Guru.
he suffers no anxiety, even in dreams. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan jaa ke man maeh |
lines.english: With the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, in his mind,
My doubts and attachments have been totally obliterated. ||4||20||71||
When my God is totally pleased with me,
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਕਉ ਲੇਹੁ ਉਧਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mohi niragun kau lehu udhaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am worthless - save me, O Lord! ||1||Pause||
Continually listening to Your Glory, I live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਂ ਦੂਖੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਕਹੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਨੇਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taan dookh bharam kahu kaise neraa |1|
lines.english: then, tell me, how can suffering or doubt draw near me? ||1||
I have obtained my reward, chanting the Mantra of the True Guru. ||2||
My suffering has been ended, and my anxiety is forgotten.
He is True, and True is His glory.
Says Nanak, what action is there left to do,
Remembering, remembering Him in meditation, keep Him clasped to your heart. ||3||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
Sexual desire, anger, and egotism lead to ruin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥੪॥੨੧॥੭੨॥
lines.translit: jaa kai man vasiaa har naamaa |4|21|72|
lines.english: by one whose mind is filled with the Lord's Name? ||4||21||72||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਛੂਟੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har simaran kar har jan chhootte |1|
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, the Lord's humble servants are redeemed. ||1||
The mortals are asleep, intoxicated with the wine of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਗਤ ਭਗਤ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaagat bhagat simarat har raate |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The devotees remain awake, imbued with the Lord's meditation. ||1||Pause||
Bound to household and possessions, the mortals are lost in the deep, dark pit.
In emotional attachment and doubt, the mortals wander through countless incarnations.
The devotees remain ever-stable, meditating on the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||2||
The Saints are liberated, knowing the Lord to be near at hand. ||3||
obtains peace in this world, and salvation in the world hereafter. ||4||22||73||
Says Nanak, one who has taken to God's Sanctuary,
